mapper.select: SELECT id, reservation_id, device_id, device_order, created_at FROM reservation_device WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} ORDER BY device_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT NULL AS id, r.id AS reservation_id, r.device_id AS device_id, 0 AS device_order, NULL AS created_at FROM reservation r WHERE r.device_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation_device rd WHERE rd.reservation_id = r.id ) ORDER BY r.created_at ASC, r.id ASC
